quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. "Gadget leads with $2,392.00 (33.4% of revenue) despite only 16 units sold" and each region shows dollars and percent share.

specificity.why: Every recommendation names products, regions, and figures, e.g. "Promote Gadget bundles in West, its weakest region" and "Review Sprocket pricing; it moves 238 units but yields the lowest revenue share."

insight_density.why: Multiple actionable, non-obvious observations surface concentration and inversions like Gadget's revenue lead "despite only 16 units sold" and Widget's highest volume (106 units) yet second in revenue.

quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. 'Gadget leads with $2,392.00 (33.4% of revenue)' and 'West trails at $1,414.82 (19.8%)'.

specificity.why: Every recommendation names a product, region, and data point, e.g. 'Promote Gadget bundles in West, its weakest region' and 'Review Sprocket pricing; it moves 238 units but yields the lowest revenue share.'

insight_density.why: Multiple actionable non-obvious observations surface, e.g. 'Gadget leads... despite only 16 units sold, driven by its $149.50 price' and Widget leading volume (106 units) yet trailing Gadget in revenue.

quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. "Gadget leads with $2,392.00 (33.4% of revenue) despite only 16 units sold" and "North tops the regions at $2,176.35 (30.4%)".

specificity.why: Each recommendation names a product, region, and figure, e.g. "Promote Gadget bundles in West, its weakest region" and "Review Sprocket pricing; it moves 238 units but yields the lowest revenue share."

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations like Gadget's revenue lead "despite only 16 units sold, driven by its $149.50 price" and Sprocket moving the most units yet earning the lowest share.
